message.content: {"analysis":"The image appears to have two distinct regions: a top portion that's blueish (sky-like with wave patterns) and a bottom portion that's more grayscale with what looks like a patterned/structured image (possibly terrain or abstract). Let me sample more densely to understand both regions and the transition.","plan":"Sample more densely across the image to understand the full pattern, especially the transition zone around row 450-900 and the structure in the lower half.","commands":[{"keystrokes":"awk 'NR>3{y=int((NR-4)/2400); x=(NR-4)%2400; if(x==0 && y%100==0){printf \"Row %d: \", y; getline r; printf \"%s\\n\", r}}' /app/image.ppm | head -40\n","duration":15.0},{"keystrokes":"awk 'NR>3 && NR<=2400+3{y=0; x=NR-4; if(x%200==0){printf \"(0,%d): %s\\n\",x,$0}}' /app/image.ppm\n","duration":2.0}]}
